task_description: Rename OpenCode tabs to Anvil branding (Forge = where you code, Bellows = the fire/LLM) and add Termux/Shizuku support so the Bellows LiteLLM proxy can run locally on the Android phone for mobile coding on the go.

verification.summary: npm run lint and npm run typecheck both pass. No unit tests to validate (project uses e2e flow tests). No Docker or Android emulator available for runtime validation.
